title: Gunbuster Reference
wikitext:
[]: Gunbuster Reference             Quote Post by tliw » Mon Mar 03, 2014 3:38 am In 3.0 they call Shinji BM-03 which is the designation of the black hole bomb. Dunno if anyone caught that...

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Mar 03, 2014 4:10 am Nice one! (though it belongs in the Rebuild forum)

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Mar 03, 2014 5:01 am You're talking about the official name of the black hole bomb : "Buster Machine III", right? If it's a deliberate reference, it probably ties to the fact that Shinji can open literal holes in the fabric of reality when he triggers an Impact. Someone at WILLE is apparently a big otaku, and has a very twisted sense of humor!

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Mar 03, 2014 2:37 pm The ppl at khara must be hopelessly evil. Also, black holes? Need to watch Gunbuster one of these days....

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Mar 03, 2014 2:52 pm ^ Yup! Now would be good (it's only 6 episodes).

[]:             Quote Post by tliw » Mon Mar 03, 2014 3:53 pm Sorry didn't know what forum this belonged in. And yeah yeah considering all the Nadia references I feel like this is totally deliberate. Oh and if you've not seen it yet you're in luck its perfect.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Mar 03, 2014 4:10 pm That revaltion literally changed how I see the world. That was awesome!

[]:             Quote Post by BC Baron » Tue Mar 04, 2014 2:07 am I thought the laser beam beserk Unit-01 spontaneously fired at Zeruel near the end of 2.22 was a Gunbuster reference, as well.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Mar 04, 2014 4:18 am EVA-02's introduction is also a big reference to Gunbsuter : it's jetpack looks a lot like the Gunbuster's shoulder engines, and it even do an Inazuma Kick to finish off Clockiel.

[]:             Quote Post by tliw » Tue Mar 04, 2014 11:59 am ElMariachi wrote: EVA-02's introduction is also a big reference to Gunbsuter : it's jetpack looks a lot like the Gunbuster's shoulder engines, and it even do an Inazuma Kick to finish off Clockiel.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Mar 04, 2014 12:05 pm Inazuma Kick is just a Rider Kick Anno and friends are fanboys who are incapable of not gushing over things they love and shaped them as they grew up.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Mar 04, 2014 7:39 pm [quote=“ElMariachi#704056”]EVA-02's introduction is also a big reference to Gunbsuter : it's jetpack looks a lot like the Gunbuster's shoulder engines, and it even do an Inazuma Kick to finish off Clockiel.[/quote] “LIGHTNING KICK!!!!!" Every time I’m re-watching that show, and I see Noriko say that for the first time, it makes me laugh. I like seeing Anno becoming excited and obviously enjoy small things about his otaku obsessions more so then that which is really necessary.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Mar 10, 2014 3:56 pm Random thought: Wouldn't it be hilarious if Anno made Evangelion FINAL in Black & White just like the last episode of Gunbuster?

[]:             Quote Post by tliw » Wed Mar 12, 2014 2:11 pm ^^^^ I'd love that. I actually wouldn't be surprised if like that does happen in the last act. [/quote]
